pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh verification script
Task description and export_result.sh verification script
Task description and Splunk documentation for tutorialdata.zip (Buttercup Games access logs)
setup_splunk.sh data ingestion script and task description

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Splunk Tutorial Data representing the fictional 'Buttercup Games' web logs, ingested into the 'tutorial' index. The logs are automatically assigned the 'access_combined_wcookie' sourcetype. The environment is configured with Splunk administrator credentials ('admin' / 'SplunkAdmin1!'). The validation scripts explicitly expect a new lookup definition named 'http_status_def' and a saved search named 'Web_Status_Summary'.
